title: Borscht Quesadillas
description: A fusion twist on traditional Mexican quesadillas, using the flavors of borscht for a unique and delicious experience.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a bowl, mix together borscht, shredded cheese, and chopped cure.
Place a flour tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle a quarter of the borscht mixture onto half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the filling is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the other side is also crispy.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve with sour cream and cilantro.
Serve immediately and garnish with lime wedges.
